name: safesend
description: SafeSend — multi-layer scam prevention demo for Touch 'n Go FinHack hackathon

scripts.dev: concurrently -n mock-api,user,plugin,agent -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w services/mock-api" "npm run dev -w apps/user-app" "npm run dev -w apps/plugin" "npm run dev -w apps/agent-dashboard"
